item.title: A message from 7/8 Athletics:
item.description: Reminder that today is the last practice for 7/8 Track & Field. There will be a meeting at 9:05 in room 148 this morning.

item.title: A message from the main office:
item.description: A reminder to students in grades 9 to 12: if you want to dress down during exams you can donate at least 2 uniform items. The donated uniforms must be dropped off at the main office, with the student name recorded, before is June 12th.

item.title: A message from Mrs. Lalonde:
item.description: Attention all Grade 11 students interested in joining next year’s Prom Committee! Join us for a meeting on Wednesday at lunch in Room 202. We’d love to see new ideas and new faces there!

item.title: A message from Mr. Curtis:
item.description: The Spring Music Concert is coming up! On Wednesday, June 3rd @7:00pm, the concert will feature the Yardbirds and our dynamic STA Senior Band! No price at the door, but will be accepting food doantions for our local food bank. Staff and students are welcome to attend as we celebrate the work of these musicians this year.

item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: All students helping with the year-end liturgy tomorrow, please remember to come to the atrium 4th period today to rehearse. Thank you!

item.title: A message from Mr. Lannin and Mrs. Kwok:
item.description: Former students of Mme Laroche at SMTCS, please don't forget to drop by room 127 to sign her retirement gift!

item.title: A message from Mme Bourdon:
item.description: Today is the last day to order your BBQ meal through school cash online. The year end BBQ will be on Thurday June 11th during both lunches and it will be hosted by M&M meat shop. Mme Bourdon would like to meet with all the grade 7/8 GALA talent show participants during the eating portion of lunch today. Please meet her after lunch recess at her office.

item.title: A message from Mr. and Mrs. Longval
item.description: Congratulations to Charlotte and Seth on their strong showings at East Regionals. Seth finished 6th overall in Senior Boys Javelin and Charlotte finished 13th in Novice Girls 3000m. Amazing job.

item.title: A message from M. Benoit:
item.description: There will be an important meeting in room 247 foir all 7&8 students trying out for Flag Football

item.title: A message from: Mr. Longval:
item.description: Our Varsity Skills football camp is this week for any high school students interested in football in the fall. Our camp is Monday, Tuesday and Thursday 2:30-4:30 this week.
